attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LNS_EXT.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID, STG_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LNS_EXT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
 STG_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LNS_EXT.UNIQUE_ID, STG_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LNS_EXT.UNIT_LIST_PRICE, 
 STG_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LNS_EXT.OA_FLAG, STG_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LNS_EXT.ISV_NAME, 
 STG_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LNS_EXT.TRUEUP_COMMITMENT_AMOUNT, STG_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LNS_EXT.TRUEUP_USAGE_AMOUNT_FOR_PERIOD, 
 STG_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LNS_EXT.CONCURRENT_PROGRAM_ID, STG_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LNS_EXT.REQUEST_ID, 
 STG_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LNS_EXT.CREATED_BY, STG_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LNS_EXT.CREATION_DATE,
 STG_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LNS_EXT.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LNS_EXT.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, 
 STG_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LNS_EXT.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LNS_EXT.SOURCE_DML_TYPE,
 STG_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LNS_EXT.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LNS_EXT.REFRESH_DATETIME, 
 STG_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LNS_EXT.TRIAL_CREDIT_FLAG, STG_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LNS_EXT.SUBSCRIPTION_NUMBER,
 STG_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LNS_EXT.RATIO, STG_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LNS_EXT.CCW_ORDER_LINE_ID ,
STG_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LNS_EXT.ATTRIBUTE10,
STG_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LNS_EXT.PRICING_TERM  /* SIGORANT ADDED AS PART OF Q2FY19 */ ,
STG_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LNS_EXT.AMORTIZED_SUBSC_CREDIT_AMOUNT, /* ssreshta ADDED AS PART OF Q2FY19 */ 
STG_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LNS_EXT.ATTRIBUTE12 ,  /* Added as part of Revenue Accruals Q2FY19 */ 
STG_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LNS_EXT.ATTRIBUTE13 ,  /* Added as part of Revenue Accruals Q2FY19 */ 
STG_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LNS_EXT.ATTRIBUTE19,
STG_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LNS_EXT.ATTRIBUTE20,
STG_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LNS_EXT.ATTRIBUTE18,
STG_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LNS_EXT.BUNDLE_FLAG,
STG_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LNS_EXT.REV_ACCOUNT,
STG_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LNS_EXT.DISCOUNT_AMOUNT,
STG_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LNS_EXT.TRX_SOURCE_IDENTIFIER,
STG_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LNS_EXT.PERIODIC_BILLING_FLAG,
STG_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LNS_EXT.PERIODIC_BILLING_START_DATE,
STG_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LNS_EXT.PERIODIC_BILLING_END_DATE,
STG_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LNS_EXT.PERIODIC_BILLING_SCHD_NUMBER,
STG_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LNS_EXT.PO_LINE_REFERENCE,
STG_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LNS_EXT.CXEA_SUPP_SKU_TYPE,
STG_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LNS_EXT.THIRD_PARTY_LINE_FLAG,
STG_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LNS_EXT.CREDIT_REFERENCE_WEB_ORDER_ID

FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LNS_EXT STG_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LNS_EXT,
 (
 select CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LNS_EXT
 minus
 select CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_EXTN
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = STG_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LNS_EXT.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LNS_EXT.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LNS_EXT)
